series_metadata.series_title: Healthcare Integrity and Protection Data Bank Adverse Action Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Healthcare Integrity and Protection Data Bank Adverse Action Report is a confidential document created by the Healthcare Integrity and Protection Data Bank when an adverse action is reported involving a licensed entity. The report includes the identification of the individual,contains sensitive data, and the details of specific actions taken by the agency against the licensed entity.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three months final report is cleared by HIPDB. ; Electronic: three months final report is cleared by HIPDB
